headline: Added start-path memory so the first-run guide can hand off into a returning recall bar on home, magazine, and route start.
notes: First-run guide CTA clicks now save the chosen start path locally, including source page, kind, target href, and city context.
Home, magazine, and route start can now show a compact returning recall bar that helps users pick up from their last start path.
Release-check can reset the stored start-path memory and now includes that state in the release report.
